entry.title: IDC W56HZV18D0010 (P00054) awarded to OSHKOSH DEFENSE, LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: UPDATE ATTACHMENTS 0014 AND 0025, SECTION C.3.2.5, AND CLAUSE 252.232-7006, WAWF PAYMENT INSTRUCTIONS, AT NO COST.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: COMBAT, ASSAULT, AND TACTICAL VEHICLES, WHEELED

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
